reflex_app = None

    def test_regenerate_button_visible_on_page(reflex_app):
        r = requests.get(f"{FRONTEND_URL}/", timeout=30)
        assert r.status_code == 200, f"GET {FRONTEND_URL}/ failed with {r.status_code}"
